mechanics.excerpt: How did they develop those weapons ahead of us?" At least rets rospect; the answer simple They didn't fight two and half centuries worth of Succession Wars While the Inner Sphere wasted its energies conflict, the Clans built society thousand light years away: With knowledge of the Star League ad many of its top scientists_ they continued t0 develop new and better technologies_ Medical and planetary sciences wiped out deadly plagues and made 175
